name: same-session-computer-use
description: Operate the user's real logged-in Linux applications without creating a second profile or desktop session.

interface.shortDescription: Control your real logged-in Linux apps.
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex inspect and operate existing windows in your current Hyprland login, preserving application processes, profiles, files, and signed-in state. It adds exact background capture, accessibility actions, targeted shortcuts, and window-local click, scroll, and drag controls that preserve your physical pointer, focus, and workspace.
defaultPrompt: Use my existing logged-in app to complete this task in the background.
Show me an exact screenshot of one of my real application windows.
Operate this app without moving my pointer or changing my workspace.
